vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current occupancy. P1 (Yellow Pot) is present but shows signs of severe decline. P2/P4 (Black Pot) are largely absent or reduced to debris. P3 (Black Pot with Rabbit) contains a single leaf specimen, likely a Pothos cutting, but the rest of the pot is empty.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Present (Yellow Pot), but shows systemic decline/shriveling.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss (No viable plant matter visible).
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Black Pot with Rabbit), single leaf remaining.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No viable plant matter visible).

plant_audit.P1: Visible in the yellow pot; leaf turgor is low, showing signs of chlorosis and desiccation.
plant_audit.P2: No evidence of Mexican Mint; soil surface is barren.
plant_audit.P3: Single Pothos leaf remains; appears stable but isolated.
plant_audit.P4: No evidence of Silver Guest; soil surface is barren.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Soil appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of eggshell fragments across the soil surface, acting as a non-organic mulch/anomaly.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant biological growth outside of the pots.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a single green leaf in P3 and a small sprout in P4/P2 area.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Sprout in P4/P2 area shows signs of wilting/browning.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Further loss of structural integrity in the P4/P2 sprout; P3 leaf remains static.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: P4/P2 sprout has effectively collapsed or withered into the soil debris.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Stasis; no recovery observed. Systemic loss of secondary specimens confirmed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. The lack of moisture and the presence of decaying organic debris (eggshells) suggest poor substrate management. P3 is the only pot with a surviving specimen, though it is not thriving.
anomalies: Widespread eggshell fragments in all pots (New Intervention).
Total loss of P2 and P4 specimens (Systemic Loss).
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. The transition from the earliest image to the current state shows a clear trajectory of desiccation and specimen loss. The 'White Rabbit' anchor in P3 remains the only constant, while the surrounding flora has largely succumbed to environmental stress. The eggshells appear to be an attempt at soil amendment that has not yielded positive growth results.
